FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_VOID_HOLE_POWER.desc: Whenever this creature gains a debuff, gain 1 additional stack of [gold]Void Hole[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_POWER.title: Iaido
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_POWER.descript: When attacked, consume [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to the damage to negate it and counter for the same amount. All [gold]Iaido[/gold] is removed when you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] or at turn start. [gold]Dexterity[/gold] amplifies [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained.
Lose 1 HP whenever this creature attacks. At the end of its turn, lose 1 stack.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_ZANXIN_POWER.title: Zanxin
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_ZANXIN_POWER.descrip: Your next [gold]Block[/gold] or [gold]Iaido[/gold] gain is increased by 1.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_MIST_SLASH_POWER.des: Your next [gold]Attack[/gold] with more than 1 hit gains {Amount} additional hits.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_QUICK_ABSORPTION_POW: Whenever you gain [gold]Iaido[/gold] this turn, gain {Amount} additional [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HEAVEN_MAY_POWER.des: Your [gold]Iaido[/gold] damages ALL enemies this turn.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CONTINUOUS_CAST_POWE: Whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] this turn, draw 1 card.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CONVERSION_CAST_POWE: Whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] this turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Zanxin[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HEAT_DEATH_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP. At the end of your turn, double your [gold]Heat Death[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_SURGE_POWER.de: This turn, [gold]Iaido[/gold] damage is multiplied by {Amount}.
